string.text: Base, requesting a squad at %s, do you copy?
Come in base, we need a squad at %s, copy?
Come in base, requesting a squad at %s, over.
Base, do you copy? I need a squad at %s, over.
Base, we need a squad at %s asap, over.
Copy that, we're sending a squad from %s to your location.
We hear you, sending a squad from %s to your location now.
Roger, we're sending a squad your way from %s now.
Affirmative, squad is being deployed to your location from %s.
Roger that, a squad from %s is now moving out to your location.
There are no squads available at the moment; we're sending the next squad from %s to your location.
squad is being deployed to: %s.
Cancel requsets for squads for this smart
Ignore empty targets
Request squad on this smart
Sit tight, we're already headed to %s.
Hey, we're already on the way to %s, over.
Base already sent us to your location at %s.
We're heading to %s already, don't worry.
Heads up, we're already headed to %s.
Negative, there are no bases in your vicinity to reinforce, over.
No can do, there are no bases in range of your area.
Negative, there are no bases in range of your area, over.
Not possible, we have no bases in range of your area.
Not possible, we have no bases in your vicinity to reinforce.
An allied attack force from %s is launching an assault on %s.
Enemy forces are approaching %s.
Base, enemy forces targeting %s have been eliminated, over.
Great job, boys - we wiped them out! Everybody at %s can rest now.
Good job, guys. Looks like there aren't any more hostiles headed to %s.
Looks like we're clear - %s is secure.
Come in base, we repelled the forces attacking %s, over.
Enemy forces are approaching %s. Reinforcements have been sent.
Enemy forces are approaching %s. More reinforcements are needed!
Enemy forces are approaching %s. Reinforcements needed!
Enemy forces are approaching %s. Allied forces are retreating.
%s is cancelled due to %s's unfortunate death.
Guys, nice to meet you, I'm our new $role. Come meet me at $smart.
Hey, stalkers, I'm your new $role, here at $smart.
Sidorovich sent me here as $role, providing my services at $smart.
Listen up, scumbags - I'm your new $role at $smart. Don't even think about ripping me off.
Yo, bandits! Got ourselves a new $role here at $smart. My prices ain't negotiable, got it?
New $role in town at $smart. You need my services, you pay up front - no exceptions.
Attention all Clear Sky operatives - new $role assigned to $smart. Report for briefing.
Clear Sky command has deployed a $role to $smart. All personnel, take note.
This is your new $role at $smart. Here to support Clear Sky operations in the area.
Attention, Duty members - new $role deployed to $smart. Maintain order and discipline.
Duty command has assigned a $role to $smart. All soldiers, acknowledge and proceed.
New $role reporting for duty at $smart. Here to serve Duty and maintain Zone security.
Hey brothers, new $role here at $smart. Freedom doesn't restrict trade - come by anytime!
What's up, stalkers? Your new $role at $smart. No rules, no restrictions - just good business.
Freedom's got a new $role at $smart. Drop by whenever you want, we're always open.
New $role operational at $smart. Services available to paying clients only.
Mercenary $role now stationed at $smart. Cash transactions only - no exceptions.
Professional $role at $smart. You get what you pay for - nothing more, nothing less.
Military command has assigned a $role to $smart. All personnel, follow protocol.
Attention - new $role deployed to $smart by military command. Unauthorized access forbidden.
This is your assigned $role at $smart. Military personnel only - civilians stay clear.
Ecologists have assigned a $role to $smart for research support. All personnel are welcome for scientific cooperation.
Scientific expedition has deployed a $role to $smart. Services available for Zone research purposes.
New $role reporting at $smart. Here to provide scientific support and maintain research operations.
The Monolith has blessed us with a $role at $smart. Rejoice, brothers!
Praise the Monolith! A new $role serves at $smart in the name of the Great Crystal.
The Monolith's will be done - new $role now serves at $smart. Glory to the Monolith!
Got a new $role at $smart. Don't like it? Too bad - we run this place now.
Listen up, maggots - new $role here at $smart. You want something, you better show respect.
New $role operating at $smart. Cross us and you'll regret it - we don't play nice.
The Zone has granted us a $role at $smart. We see with eyes beyond sight - redemption awaits in darkness!
Brothers in darkness, the Zone provides a $role at $smart. We who are blind shall lead the seeing to salvation!
The divine Zone speaks through us - new $role serves at $smart. Embrace the darkness, embrace redemption!
UN operative assigned to $smart as $role. Clearance level required for further information.
ISG has deployed a $role to $smart. This is classified information - maintain operational security.
New $role now operational at $smart under UN mandate. Details are need-to-know only.
